titles.title: GaPFlow: Gap-averaged flow simulations with Gaussian process regression

institution.institution_name: Institute for Applied Materials, Karlsruhe Institute for Technology, Strasse am Forum 7, 76131 Karlsruhe, Germany
Center for Complexity and Biosystems, Department of Physics, University of Milan, Via Celoria 16, 20133 Milan, Italy
